text: How much is the report?
The price is 2,500 reais.

How much is it?
A discount of 10 percent.

How many reports are there?
There are two payment dates.
Good morning, Maísa. How are you today?
I am great, thank you. How is the weather in Rio?
It is sunny and warm. So, how much is the new report?
The price is 2,500 reais. But there is a discount of 10 percent for you.
That is not expensive. It is a good price. How many payment dates are there?
There are two dates: July 15 and August 15.
Perfect. And how many reports are there this year?
There are four reports, one every three months. Thank you, and have a great day!
The price is 2,500 reais, with a 10 percent discount.
How many reports do you want this year?
Thank you, and have a great day!

Hello, this is David. I have some numbers for you. The price of the new report is two thousand five hundred reais. But there is a discount of ten percent, so the final price is two thousand two hundred fifty reais. There are two payment dates: July fifteen and August fifteen. How many reports do you want this year? We have four reports, one every three months. Please call me back. Thank you, and have a great day!

Good morning, everyone. This is Sarah. I have news about our budget. This year, our budget is one hundred thousand reais. That is a good number for the team. Before our meeting, remember to make small talk with the client. Ask about the weather, and ask how they are. Small talk is important. Our next meeting is on Monday, July fourteen, at ten in the morning. There are six people in the meeting. Please be on time. How much time do you need for your report? Tell me before Friday. Thank you!

Good morning. The price of the report is two thousand five hundred reais. There is a discount of ten percent. The final price is two thousand two hundred fifty reais. The payment date is July fifteen.
